channel.title: Sajda on amardeepsidhu.com
channel.description: Recent content in Sajda on amardeepsidhu.com

item.title: SAJDA on Zee Punjabi
item.description:
piche je ik wari zee punjabi te ik show shuru hoya c…naa c SAJDA…kise ne kise mahaan shaksheeyat bare dikhaya janda c…fer shayad eh band ho gia c…aj main zee punjabi dekh riha c tan ohi program dubara dekhia…shayad dubara shuru ho gia hai…aj dikhaya gia kuldeep manak di life baare…

eh bahut hi mehnat naal banaya show lagda hai…anchor wadia punjabi bol riha c…filmanakan bahut sohne tareeke naal kita gia c…pinda de wich ja ke…jihde shahar di gal hundi utho da kuch dikhya janda c…kull mila ke bahut wadia cheez banai gai a…show sirf 30 min da hai…jo k mere khiyal ch ghat ne…1 ghanta te ghat ton ghat hona chahida hai….eh show shayad har sunday nu shaam nu 8:30 waje aaunda hai…shyad eh kade dubhara dikhaya janda hove par zee punjabi di website nahi chal rahi so main pakka nai kar sakia…
